    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    G

    Game - Class in whistapp.domain.game
     
    Game() - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.game.Game
     
    GameCLI - Class in whistapp.ui
    Base CLI for game modes that run a Whist game loop.
    GameCLI(Controller) - Constructor for class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Create a GameCLI bound to the given controller.
    generateScores(HashMap, int, int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
    A helper method that generates the scores array when given the positive and negative scores for the bidders and the non-bidders (not respectively per se).
    getActivePlayerIndex() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A getter for the index of the player whose turn it currently is.
    getActivePlayerName() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A getter for the currently active players name.
    getActivePlayerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the name of the active player (either bidding or playing).
    getActivePlayerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter for the active player's name (either bidding or playing) in the current round.
    getActivePlayerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the active player's name (either bidding or playing).
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Returns the allowed card names for the current active player.
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the cards the current player is legally allowed to play.
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for finding which cards the current player is legally allowed to play.
    getAllowedHandCards(Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A method for finding all the allowed hand cards for a given suit.
    getAllowedHandCards(Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    Returns the strings of all legally allowed cards given the trick's lead suit.
    getAutonomousBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.BotPlayer
    A simple getter for the type of bid for a bot.
    getAutonomousBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A method for getting the bid from an autonomous player.
    getAvailableBidTypes(BidType, boolean) - Static method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    Determines which bids are still available to be played.
    getBaseValue() - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Miserie
    Returns the base value for the miserie.
    getBaseValue() - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.OpenMiserie
    Returns the base value for the open miserie.
    getBidders() - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
    Simple getter to retrieve the declarers of this bid.
    getBidTypes() - Static method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A simple getter returning all bids a player can make.
    getBidTypes() - Static method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    A simple getter that returns all possible bids a player can make as an array
    getBidTypes() - Static method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter for the different bid types.
    getBotDifficultyOptions() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Gets the possible bot difficulties.
    getBotDifficultyOptions() - Static method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter for the different bot difficulty options.
    getCards() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Gets the cards of the currently active player.
    getCards(String) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Gets the cards of the currently active player.
    getCardsAsStrings() - Method in class whistapp.domain.Trick
    A simple getter for finding the cards played per player.
    getCardsFromPreviousTrick() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A simple getter for finding the cards of the previously played trick in the current round.
    getCardsFromPreviousTrick() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for finding the cards in the previous trick.
    getCardsInTrick() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the cards in this trick.
    getChoice(String, T[]) - Method in class whistapp.ui.CLI
    Prompt the user to choose one option from a list.
    getChoices(String, T[]) - Method in class whistapp.ui.CLI
    Prompt the user to select multiple options from a list.
    getCurrentBiddingPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the current bidding player in this round.
    getCurrentBiddingPlayersCards() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the cards of the current player bidding.
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.Trick
    A simple getter for finding the current player playing in this trick.
    getCurrentPlayingPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the current player playing in the current trick.
    getCurrentPlayingPlayersCards() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the cards of the current player, who is currently playing in the current trick.
    getCurrentRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the current round.
    getCurrentRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A simple getter for finding the current round in this game.
    getCurrentRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.ScoreGame
    A simple getter returning the current round in this score game.
    getCurrentRoundCurrentTrickCards() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter for the trick cards of the current trick in the current round.
    getCurrentRoundTrumpSuit() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the trump suit of the current round.
    getCurrentRoundTrumpSuit() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter for the trump suit of the current round.
    getCurrentTrick() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the current trick in this round.
    getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A method reporting the played cards in the active trick.
    getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the cards played in the current trick.
    getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A getter for the name of the winner of the current trick.
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the name of the winner of the current trick.
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Returns the name of the player who would win the current trick based on cards played so far and the active trump suit.
    getDealer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the dealer.
    getDealerName() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A getter for the name of the active dealer.
    getDealerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the name of the dealer for the current round.
    getDealerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getExistingBids() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Returns a string showing every active bid in this round.
    getExistingBids() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns a string showing the existing bids made by players this round.
    getExistingBids() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns a string showing every active bid in this round.
    getExistingBids() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Returns a string showing the bids already made by players this round.
    getFinalBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Returns the final bid.
    getFinalBidDeclarers() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Return the active round bids declarers.
    getFinalBidDeclarers() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the names of the declarers of the final winning bid.
    getFinalBidDeclarers() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getFinalBidName() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Returns the active chosen bids name.
    getFinalBidName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the name of the final winning bid.
    getFinalBidName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns the active chosen bids name.
    getGameScoresPerPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Gets the results of the entire game, namely the amount of points for every player.
    getHandCards() - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A simple getter finding the string values of all the cards in this hand.
    getHandCards() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A simple getter that finds the cards in this player's hand.
    getHandSize() - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A simple getter for the size of this hand.
    getHighestBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the highest bid of the current round.
    getHighestBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns the highest bid established in this round so far.
    getHighestBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the highest bid so far.
    getHighestBid(HashMap) - Static method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Finds the highest bid from a map of bids.
    getInputInt(String) - Method in class whistapp.ui.CLI
    Prompt the user for an integer input.
    getInputString(String) - Method in class whistapp.ui.CLI
    Prompt the user for a string input.
    getLabel() - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.players.BotDifficulty
    A simple getter for the label.
    getLastCard() - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Deck
    A getter for the last card in the deck (which will always be dealt face up and determines the trump suit)
    getLastDealtCard() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A getter for the last dealt card this round (which is always dealt face up).
    getLastDealtCard() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Simple getter that returns the last dealt card as a string.
    getLastDealtCard() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter for the last dealt card in the current round.
    getLastDealtCard() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the last dealt card in this round.
    getLastTrickString() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A function that retrieves a string showing the last played trick
    getLastTrickString() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for viewing the last completed trick from the current round.
    getLastTrickString() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns a string representation of the last completed trick.
    getLeadSuit() - Method in class whistapp.domain.Trick
    A simple getter for finding hte leading suit of this trick.
    getLoneProposerName() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    getLoneProposerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    getLoneProposerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    getLoneProposerName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    getLossScore() - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Solo
    Gets the loss score for the bid.
    getLossScore() - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.SoloSlim
    SoloSlim simply changes the loss score compared to Solo.
    getName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A simple getter for the name of this player.
    getNextGameChoice() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Ask the user whether they want to start another game.

    A simple getter finding the next player in line to play or bid.

    A simple getter for the numeric value.
    getOpenMiserieHands() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Gets the hands of the open miserie players.
    getOpenMiserieHands(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the open miserie hands of the current round.
    getOpenMiserieHands(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter for the cards of the other players currently bidding open miserie.
    getOpenMiserieHands(Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
    A getter for finding the open miserie hands the given player can see.
    getOpenMiserieHands(Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.OpenMiserie
     
    getOpenMiserieHands(Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A getter for the open miserie hands of the players other than the given player.
    getOrder() - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    A simple getter for the order index of this BidType.
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name, equal to the suit of the last dealt card.
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display.
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display.
    getOriginalTrumpVariant() - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    Finds the corresponding Original Trump variant of a free-trump Abondance bid.
    getOuterCard(Suit, boolean) - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A helper method for finding the highest or lowest value card in this hand for a given suit.

    A simple getter finding the player with the given name.
    getPlayerCards(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the cards of the specified player.
    getPlayerCards(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter for the cards of the specified player.
    getPlayerCount() - Static method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A simple getter for the player count of a game
    getPlayerCount() - Static method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter giving the number of players.
    getPlayerNames() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A simple getter for player names
    getPlayerNames() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter giving the player names.
    getPlayers() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter giving the player objects.
    getPlayers() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Returns the players playing in this round.
    getPlayersByName(ArrayList) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter finding multiple players with given names.
    getPossibleBidNames() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the possible bids that can still be played.
    getPossibleBidNames() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    getPossibleBids() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Return the available bids that can still be played.
    getPossibleBids() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Finds the possible bids for the current bidding player.
    getReady() - Method in class whistapp.ui.GameCLI
    Wait for the active player to be ready.

    Gets the results of a round, only implemented for PlayGameCLI

    A getter finding the round scores for each of the players of the game.
    getRoundScoresPerPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A getter finding the round scores for each of the players of the game.
    getScore() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A simple getter for the score of this player.
    getScoresPerPlayer() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter finding the scores for each of the players of the game.

    A simple getter for the suit of this card.
    getSuits() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A simple getter that returns all suits.
    getSuits() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter that returns all suits.
    getTrickCountPerRound() - Static method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple dispatch getter giving the number of tricks per round.
    getTrickCountPerRound() - Static method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Returns the number of tricks in the round.
    getTricksLeft() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A simple getter for the amount of tricks left in a round
    getTricksLeft() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns the number of tricks left in this round.
    getTricksLeft() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns the number of tricks left in this round.
    getTricksLeft() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Returns the number of tricks left to be fully played in this round.
    getTricksWon() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    Returns a map containing the number of tricks won per player.
    getTricksWonByTeam(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Proposal
    Calculates the COMBINED tricks won by the entire bidding team.

    A getter for the active trump suit in this round.

    Returns the name of the trump suit for the current round.

    Returns a display name for the trump suit of the current round.
    getTrumpSuitName() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame

    Returns the active trump suit name for display.

    Gets the win score for the bid.

    SoloSlim simply changes the win score compared to Solo.

    Prompt the user for a yes/no decision.
